title: limnophila hirsuta
intro: Limnophila hirsuta, also known as hairy marsh-elder or hairy frog's leg, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Limnophila hirsuta is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
